user.title: Samsung Family Hub
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with SmartThings.

oauth.title: Select SmartThings integration
oauth.description: Select the SmartThings integration to borrow credentials from.

data.device_id: Device ID (optional — leave blank to auto-detect)

samsung_account.title: Samsung Account
samsung_account.description: Enter your Samsung Account credentials to enable camera image downloads. 2FA must be disabled on your account.

pat.title: SmartThings Personal Access Token
pat.description: Tokens expire after 24 hours. Create one at https://account.smartthings.com/tokens

data.device_id: Device ID (optional — leave blank to auto-detect)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your SmartThings token has expired. Enter a new one.

error.invalid_samsung_auth: Invalid Samsung Account email or password.
error.samsung_2fa: Samsung Account has 2FA enabled. Disable 2FA to use this integration.
error.samsung_auth_error: Samsung Account authentication failed. Check credentials and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs.

abort.already_configured: This Family Hub is already configured.
